parsed_section_t(3) Library Functions Manual parsed_section_t(3)

NAME

parsed_section_t - Parsed section information.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/options/manpage.h>

Data Fields


char * section_name
Section name (e.g., ENVIRONMENT",OPTIONS). section_type_t type
Section type (AUTO/MANUAL/MERGE/UNMARKED). char * content
Full section content (including .SH header). size_t content_len
Length of content. size_t start_line
Line number where section starts (1-based). size_t end_line
Line number where section ends (1-based). bool has_markers
True if marked with AUTO/MANUAL/MERGE markers.

Detailed Description

Parsed section information.

Definition at line 38 of file manpage.h.

Field Documentation

True if marked with AUTO/MANUAL/MERGE markers.
